zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Dyve於大約1164年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾時，他的父親William Dyve36歲，母親Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville23歲。他和Agnes至少有4個女兒。他去世於1210年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Dyve于大约1164年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾时，他的父亲William Dyve36岁，母亲Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville23岁。他和Agnes至少有4个女儿。他去世于1210年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Dyve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Rajesh, Bharat, Ashok, Kamlesh, Kiran, Amit, Dilip, Kirit, Mukesh, Prakash, Raj, Ramesh.
Indian (Gujarat; pronounced as two syllables): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit dvivedī ‘(one who has studied) two Vedas’. Compare Dube 5.
English: from the personal name Dave, a short form of David .

variants.name: Dube
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Normand, Armand, Pierre, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Andre, Laurent, Gilles, Herve, Jacques.

French (Dubé): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, for someone from Le Bé, the name of several places in northwestern France. Compare Duba 3, Dubay 1, Dubey 1, Dubie 2, and Duby 2.
Breton (Dubé, also Le Dubé): nickname from dube, a term denoting a kind of pigeon.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Dyve was born about 1164, in Northamptonshire, England, his father, William Dyve, was 36 and his mother, Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville, was 23. He had at least 4 daughters with Agnes. He died after 1210, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Dyve est né environ 1164, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, William Dyve, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 filles avec Agnes. Il est décédé après 1210, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Dyve um 1164 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Dyve 36 und seine Mutter Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville 23. Er hatte mit Agnes mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb nach 1210 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Dyve è nato il circa 1164 nel Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, William Dyve, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figlie con Agnes. Morì dopo il 1210, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Dyveが約1164年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Dyveは36歳，母Mathilda "Maud" de Watervilleは23歳であった。彼はAgnesとの間に少なくとも4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1210年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Dyve(이)가 대략 1164년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Dyve(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Agnes(와)과 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1210년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Dyve nasceu aproximadamente 1164, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Dyve, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhas com Agnes. Ele faleceu após 1210, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Dyve родился около 1164 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Dyve было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville, 23. У него было по крайней мере 4 дочери от Agnes. Он умер после 1210 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Dyve nació aproximadamente 1164, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Dyve, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mathilda "Maud" de Waterville, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijas con Agnes. Murió después de 1210, en su pueblo.
